creator: matthew.closson@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 150173
Patch for /usr/ports/net/tcpdump/Makefile & /usr/ports/net/tcpdump/distinfo

Greetings,

Attached is a patch to upgrade the net/tcpdump port from 4.5.1 to 4.6.2.  
Please test and commit or send me some feedback on further requirements.

Thanks,

            -Matt-
